info.title: Synthora API
info.description: Multi-model AI orchestration — answers that surpass any single model

post.description: Send SMS verification code. Rate-limited per phone and per IP.
Register a new account using phone number + SMS code verification.
Revoke session server-side and clear cookie (SEC-003).
Change the current user's password (step-up auth: requires old password).

delete.description:
Permanently delete the current user's account and all associated data.

Requires ?confirm=DELETE + request body {"password": "..."} (step-up auth, RC-10).
Deletes: user record, profile JSON, query history, sessions, usage data, uploads.

get.description: Get usage stats for all users. Admin only.
Get usage history for a specific user. Admin only.

Actual API cost report for today (or given date). Admin only.

v4.30: Cost figures are now read from per-query estimated_cost_usd stored in
query_history (actual tracked cost, not P50 estimates). P50 fallback is used
only when no history records exist for the date (e.g. new deployment).

Returns per-mode call counts, actual API cost, and top users by consumption.
Return paginated query history for the current user.
Get a summary of the user's cognitive profile with structured data for visualization.

Get CBA narrative behavioral summary (ADR-014).

Returns narrative-style insights about the user's cognitive
behavioral patterns: divergent-convergent dynamics, engagement
patterns, and topic exploration. No labels, only observable patterns.

post.description:
Delete all cognitive tracking data for the current user (原则#22 用户主权).

Preserves non-cognitive fields (preferences, mode history).
Requires explicit confirmation via query param ?confirm=true.

get.description:
Export all user data as JSON (原则#22 用户主权 — 数据控制权).

Returns complete profile, cognitive data, behavior analytics,
and query history in a single downloadable JSON.
Return Memory-lite recent_turns for cross-session continuity card (ML-04).

Growth visualization data (原则#19: 成长可视化).

Returns topic depth progression, expertise scores, and exploration
patterns so the user can see "我不知不觉就变强了".
Get current user's daily usage and remaining quota.

Get user's capability map for frontend visualization.

Returns topic depth radar data, active improvement plans,
cognitive quadrant summary, and growth trend.
List all improvement plans for the current user.

post.description: Accept and activate a proposed improvement plan.
Record that user engaged with a micro-challenge (responded to it).
Legacy blocking endpoint — kept for backward compatibility.

方案C: SSE streaming Socratic start — user sees progress in ~10s.

Events:
  socratic_stage     — pipeline stage update (recruiting/searching/thinking/analyzing/guiding)
  socratic_contributor — one expert responded
  socratic_divergence — divergence analysis ready
  socratic_ready     — session ready, guide question generated (terminal event)
  socratic_error     — pipeline error (terminal event)

get.description: Return today's usage, limits, and remaining credits for the current user.

post.description: Route guard: check if question is suitable for roundtable.
Start a roundtable debate session (SSE streaming).
User decision point (A or B). Owner check + state isolation + idempotency.

get.description: Resume a session after auto_draft or SSE disconnect.

ai_disclosure.title: Ai Disclosure
ai_disclosure.default: 本回答由 AI 生成，仅供参考，请自行核实重要信息。

GuidanceModel.title: GuidanceModel
GuidanceModel.description: v5.2: Canonical guidance protocol — single source of truth.
